ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_year" INTEGER /* Year the match was played */,
  "left_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the left team in the match */,
  "right_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the right team in the match */,
  "left_score" INTEGER /* Score of the left team */,
  "right_score" INTEGER /* Score of the right team */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  "left_penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties committed by the left team */,
  "right_penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties committed by the right team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "ground_conditions" TEXT /* Ground conditions during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_right_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("right_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_left_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("left_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the captain of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "team_stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's home stadium */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES captains ("captain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "coaching_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "coaching_style" TEXT /* Coaching style of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "captains" (
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each captain */,
  "captain_name" TEXT /* Full name of the captain */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the captain */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the captain */,
  "playing_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of playing experience */,
  "leadership_style" TEXT /* Leadership style of the captain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("captain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the referee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the referee */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the referee is based */,
  "refereeing_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of refereeing experience */,
  "refereeing_style" TEXT /* Refereeing style of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "stadium_city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  "stadium_country" TEXT /* Country where the stadium is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., grass, turf) */,
  "stadium_address" TEXT /* Address of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the event occurred in */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., try, penalty, card) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_time" INTEGER /* Time of the event in minutes */,
  "event_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event (if applicable) */,
  "event_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the event (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "player_age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "player_height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistics are for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics are for */,
  "tries" INTEGER /* Number of tries scored by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "penalties_committed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties committed by the player */,
  "cards_received" INTEGER /* Number of cards received by the player */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed by the player */,
  "tackles_made" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "missed_tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles missed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "matches_won" INTEGER /* Number of matches won */,
  "matches_drawn" INTEGER /* Number of matches drawn */,
  "matches_lost" INTEGER /* Number of matches lost */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points conceded */,
  "penalties_committed" INTEGER /* Total penalties committed */,
  "penalties_received" INTEGER /* Total penalties received */,
  "standing_position" INTEGER /* Position in the standings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referee_seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee's season */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "matches_officiated" INTEGER /* Number of matches officiated */,
  "cards_given" INTEGER /* Number of cards given */,
  "penalties_given" INTEGER /* Number of penalties given */,
  "controversial_decisions" INTEGER /* Number of controversial decisions made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the referee's performance */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the teams and league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referee_seasons_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, referee, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "login_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., match, team, player) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used to access the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the weather data is for */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Temperature at the time of the match */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Humidity at the time of the match */,
  "wind_speed" TEXT /* Wind speed at the time of the match */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Precipitation at the time of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the injury occurred in */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., concussion, sprain) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "time_of_injury" INTEGER /* Time of the injury in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplinary_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disciplinary action */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the action is against (if applicable) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the action is against (if applicable) */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the action is related to */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of disciplinary action (e.g., suspension, fine) */,
  "action_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the disciplinary action */,
  "penalty" TEXT /* Penalty imposed (e.g., number of matches suspended, amount fined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplinary_actions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplinary_actions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplinary_actions_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
